untranslatable_reason: Signal requires three untranslatable criteria: (1) 'Candidate passes fundamental screening' — no fundamental indicators available; (2) 'Stock has doubled or more on at least 2 separate historical occasions' — requires multi-period historical returns analysis beyond single-bar indicators; (3) '90-day tight consolidation with low intra-base volatility' — requires pattern recognition and multi-bar consolidation detection not expressible as single conditions. Bollinger Bandwidth used as proxy for volatility tightness, but cannot validate historical doublings or multi-bar consolidation quality.
translation_notes: This is a multi-stage filtering rule requiring: (1) fundamental/catalyst analysis (untranslatable), (2) historical performance validation over multiple occurrences (untranslatable without backtesting memory), and (3) pattern quality assessment (partially addressed via bb_bandwidth < 0.08 as low-volatility proxy). The breakout on volume is translatable using Bollinger Bands upper band cross with volume confirmation. Exit conditions use logical reversal (break below support/base). Direction set to LONG based on breakout semantics. Consider this rule requires custom pre-screening logic before strategy execution.
